name: Cajun Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound Precooked smoked kielbasa or 6 tablespoons Olive or vegetable oil
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: TASTE OF HOME
1. Cook the potatoes in boiling salted water for 20-30 minutes or until tender; drain.
2. Rinse with cold water and cool completely.
3. Cut into 1/4-inch slices and place in a large bowl.
4. Add onions, parsley, and 3 tablespoons vinegar to the bowl; toss.
5. Cook sausage in oil (olive or vegetable) for 5-10 minutes or until it begins to brown.
6. Remove with a slotted spoon and add to potato mixture.
7. To the drippings in the skillet, add mustard, garlic, pepper, cayenne pepper, and remaining vinegar.
8. Bring to a boil and whisk constantly; pour over salad.
9. Toss gently and serve immediately.
